description: Three auth profiles (from scratch): generating a GitHub connector with THREE auth methods (Plain, APIKey, Passthrough) produces a connection.yaml with three profiles. Every non-auth connection field (the rest-of-other_connection 'url', the 'proxy'/'insecure' switches, and the engine 3-field pattern engine_mode/engine/engine_group) is duplicated into each profile, so the generator must keep every profiles[].configurations[].fields[].id globally unique across all three profiles by prefixing the 2nd/3rd occurrences and bridging them back through serializer.yaml field_mappings. triggers.yaml must reference the resolved (post-rename) field ids per profile. The golden captures the deduplicated ids + per-profile triggers + serializer bridges; any regression that lets two profiles collide on a shared engine/proxy/url id (or that points a trigger at a stale id) will diff against this golden and fail.
